title: The Painted Stallion
director: Alan James, Ray Taylor, William Witney
writer: Morgan Cox, Ronald Davidson, Barry Shipman
actors: Ray Corrigan, Hoot Gibson, LeRoy Mason
plot: The period is the 1820's and the first wagon train leaves Independence heading west to Santa Fe. In order to maintain his power, the ruthless Official at Santa Fe must not let them arrive and he sends out his men to stop them. The...
